labeling_decision: Hierarchical (partial-pooling NUTS) IS the production wOBA + xwOBA estimator in R3. Per-player conjugate Beta-Binomial is dropped from the production wOBA path; it remains a sanity check for the rate-stat side-channels (BB%, K%, BABIP, ISO, HardHit%, Barrel%) that don't enter the production blend at all. Codex's R2 critique that the hierarchical fit was 'window dressing' is now closed.
kappa_interpretation: kappa is the universe-shared concentration of the Beta prior on each player's true rate. Higher kappa -> stronger pooling toward each player's 3-year-weighted prior. Posterior q50 ~ 200 means the prior carries ~200 effective PA of weight per player.
